name: planning-skills-for-agents-and-humans
description: Planning workflows for framing, shaping, kickoff docs, breadboarding, breadboard reflection, and compact context packets.

interface.displayName: Planning Skills for Agents and Humans
interface.shortDescription: Frame, shape, breadboard, package context, and reflect before building.
interface.longDescription: A set of reusable planning workflows that help humans and agents turn fuzzy requests, messy notes, partial product ideas, kickoff conversations, and implementation discoveries into clear builder-facing artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use Planning Skills for Agents and Humans to frame this product idea before implementation.
Use the shaping skill to compare possible approaches before choosing one.
Use the breadboarding skill to map places, affordances, stores, state, and wiring for this feature.
Use the feed-planning-context skill to package the active planning artifacts for an implementation agent.
